title: 日本ダービーの後に・傲岸な勝者

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Victorious am I! Just as all expected, today's
Derby was one for the ages!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
And yet my worthy adversary, whose intensity
surpasses the Golden Generation's, declines me!
It seems that to run by my side is an honor too
high.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, the winds of time billow my sails!
Even without a worthy foe, the crowds roar for
me. They yearn for the bell to toll and mark the
passing of an era!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
So ring it I shall. The Golden Generation awaits at
the Arima Kinen!
